title: Verify Pause Flow and Content Locking
description: Tests the user's ability to pause their trial and confirms that premium content becomes inaccessible.
preconditions: User is in the 'Trial Corner' cohort.

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' hub and click 'Pause Trial'.
2. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. Verify the homepage widget and Trial Corner hub UI update to a 'Paused' state.
4. In the Trial Corner hub, attempt to click on content in the 'Engagement' or 'Trending' sections.
5. Attempt to play any premium content from anywhere in the app.

expected_result: The trial status is successfully changed to 'Paused'. All premium content sections on the Trial Corner hub are locked/disabled, and the user is blocked from playing premium content.
